name: test_should_select_time_into_date_time[datetime({year: 1984, month: 10, day: 11, hour: 12, timezone: 'Europe/Stockholm'})-{year: 1984, month: 10, day: 11, time: other, second: 42, timezone: 'Pacific/Honolulu'}-'1984-10-11T01:00:42-10:00[Pacific/Honolulu]']
